hero.name: Alexander
hero.nameExplanation: Salty Caramel + Frappuccino = SaltyFrappuccino. My favorite coffee, hence the name, and I'm a coffee addict in general. ☕
hero.description: Building products with character: fullstack apps, complex integrations, and reliable systems.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who am I?
about.description: I'm Alexander, 21 years old, from Russia. Software engineer at Sber and a teacher at Quantorium. I build scalable web applications, system integrations, and teach the next generation of developers.

philosophy.title: How I Build
philosophy.text: I ship fast, but code must outlive a single sprint. A working solution today beats a perfect one next month.
